description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a robust, angular frame and a matte metallic finish. It features a prominent cylindrical scope mounted on top, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities. The body is primarily constructed from dark metal, with some sections appearing to be reinforced or plated in a bronze or brownish material. The grip and trigger area are integrated into the lower section, with a squared-off, ergonomic design for handling. The barrel is short and thick, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the stock is minimal, resembling a pistol grip rather than a traditional shoulder stock. The overall design is utilitarian and tactical, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, metallic shotgun with a mounted scope, angular frame, and pistol grip, finished in dark and bronze tones. Its short barrel and minimal stock give it a tactical, urban-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the mounted scope, and the angular pistol grip with visible metallic and bronze sections.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, the scope's lens, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, the short barrel, and the squared-off grip, mirroring the features seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the scope, the end of the grip, and the overall narrow profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rectangular, elongated trigger guard with squared edges and no visible finger grooves
